news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Dividend Growth Leaders ETF
Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Dividend Growth Leaders ETF

holdings.infoBox: GDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 5.04%, Broadcom at 4.89%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.10%, Mueller Industries at 4.06%, and NVIDIA at 3.21%.

overview.description: The Harbor Dividend Growth Leaders ETF (GDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of large-cap, dividend-paying companies in the developed markets. Holdings are selected using a bottom-up fundamental approach. GDIV was launched on Apr 30, 2010 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Dividend Growth Leaders ETF
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. (“Harbor”), today launched the Harbor Dividend Growth Leaders ETF (GDIV), adding to its lineup of active, fully transparent ETFs. The Westfield ...

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Dividend Growth Leaders ETF
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors and Westfield Capital Management Company launch Harbor Dividend Growth Leaders fully transparent actively managed ETF (GDIV)
